parameters.content:
## Participant Recruitment Screener

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set SCREENER_EMAIL_TO and SCREENER_WEBHOOK_PATH
3. Post applicant responses via webhook (or use sample)
4. Code nodes score applicants against criteria — no LLM required
5. Approved applicants sent to researcher for outreach

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Participant Screening — {{ $json.study_name }} ({{ $json.meta.qualified_count }} qualified)
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and send outreach list | Reject
